items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 westbound between .8 miles east of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE and .2 miles east of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE. There is a lane restriction.
